ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
ast.target: <svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\"><path d=\"M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12\"/></svg>

ast.name: title
ast.source: Default value when moving to this column
ast.target: 移动到此列时的默认值

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 包含 .md 活动文件的文件夹（递归监控）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter property used for the status/label (e.g. status, state, phase)
ast.target: 用于状态/标签的 Frontmatter 属性（例如 status, state, phase）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled: case sensitive is ON — 'todo' and 'Todo' are different columns. When disabled: case insensitive — they are the same column (choose default value to write).
ast.target: 启用时：区分大小写开启 — 'todo' 和 'Todo' 是不同的列。禁用时：不区分大小写 — 它们是同一列（选择要写入的默认值）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, displays property names (e.g. 'Assignee: John'). When disabled, shows only the values (e.g. 'John').
ast.target: 启用时，显示属性名称（例如 'Assignee: John'）。禁用时，仅显示值（例如 'John'）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Define column order and colors. Drag by the ⋮⋮ icon to reorder. NO_STATUS and NOT_DECLARED_STATUS are reserved and locked. When case insensitive, choose the default value to write when moving cards.
ast.target: 定义列顺序和颜色。拖动 ⋮⋮ 图标以重新排序。NO_STATUS 和 NOT_DECLARED_STATUS 是保留且锁定的。当不区分大小写时，选择移动卡片时要写入的默认值。
